scripts.lint: ruff check app.py && python -m py_compile app.py && prettier --check "templates/**/*.html" "static/**/*.css" "static/**/*.js"
scripts.format: ruff check --fix app.py && ruff format app.py && prettier --write "templates/**/*.html" "static/**/*.css" "static/**/*.js"
scripts.lint:py: ruff check app.py && python -m py_compile app.py
scripts.format:py: ruff check --fix app.py && ruff format app.py
